allow:
Bash(git -C "C:\\Projects\\Conditioning-Control-Panel---CSharp-WPF" commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Harden .gitignore to prevent future PII/secret leaks

Add patterns for temp scripts \(tmp_*, find_*, merge_*, fix_*, scan_*,
bulk_*, cleanup_*, investigate_*, check_*, reset_*, set_force_*\),
backup files \(backup_*.json, lb_*.json\), and environment files \(*.env\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Security hardening: fix 10 vulnerabilities from full server audit

P0: Restrict /v2/user/update to admin-only for XP/level/stats,
strip download URLs from public /packs/manifest endpoint,
fix X-Forwarded-For IP spoofing \(use x-real-ip/rightmost XFF\)

P1: Fix settings-backup auth bypass, reject legacy users without
auth tokens, enable HMAC enforcement on sync, fail-hard on
missing EMAIL_HASH_KEY in production

P2: Validate OAuth redirect_uri against allowlist, remove /user/lookup
SCAN DoS vector, validate leaderboard season format and cap cache

Client: add authenticated flow for external pack downloads,
add X-Client-Version and User-Agent headers to all HttpClients

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
